name: Pumpkin-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pumpkin, sugar, spices, and salt in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Add the eggs and evaporated milk. Beat until smooth using a rotary beater or electric mixer.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake in a preheated 425 Degrees F (220 Degrees C) oven for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack.
6. Prepare the crunchy pecan topping by mixing softened butter, brown sugar, and pecans until crumbly with a fork.
7. Sprinkle the topping over the cooled pie.
8. Place the pie under the broiler flame (5-inches from the heat source) until the mixture begins to bubble, about 1 minute. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
